'''Demonsgate''', also known as '''NCW-86''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Kathol Rift/Legends|Kathol Rift]], near [[Yvara]]. From [[Realspace/Legends|space]] the planet often appeared to be engulfed in [[Fire/Legends|flames]] due to the [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] activity bleeding ionized particles into the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] that interacted with debris attracted from the Rift. In reality, Demonsgate possessed a biosphere full of life including many indigenous, non-[[Sentience/Legends|sapient]] life forms.

Though habitable, the planet was relatively arid with most of the [[Water/Legends|water]] below the surface. The multitude of active volcanoes kept the planet fairly seismically unstable and many superheated geysers would appear on the surface as a result of the underground lava flows hitting the underground water pockets.

Demonsgate was discovered and designated NCW-86 by [[Imperial Survey 1982376]]. When the ''[[FarStar]]'' came to Demonsgate, [[Makezh]] stole the [[Codex]] from the ship and crashed on the planet's surface. The [[Aing-Tii/Legends|Aing-Tii]] Monks recovered both Makezh and the Codex. When the ''FarStar'' left Demonsgate, [[Firdaaz|"Gammer" Firdaaz]] stayed behind to maintain the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Lifeline Project]].
